intended_use: AudaxCeph Cephalogram Analysis Software is designed for use by specialized dental practices for storing and presenting patient images and assisting in treatment planning. Results produced by the softw
intended_use_full: AudaxCeph Cephalogram Analysis Software is designed for use by specialized dental practices for storing and presenting patient images and assisting in treatment planning. Results produced by the software's treatment planning tools are dependent on the interpretation of trained and licensed practitioners.
ground_truth: Orthodontist review of automatically-detected landmarks; acceptance criteria established from manual landmark placement accuracy study combined with literature review
other_metrics: Mean Radial Error (MRE) for lateral cephalograms ≤1.5 mm (PASS); Mean Radial Error (MRE) for frontal (PA) cephalograms ≤2.5 mm (PASS)
